subcodes.first_line: O Abu'l-Qásim! Through the grace of God, mayest thou be blessed with His favors and act in accordance with that which beseemeth thee. Thy letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اباالقاسم انشاء الله بعنایت حق فائز باشی و بانچه سزاوار است عامل مکتوبت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
